mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_songs (user_id, song_id, is_saved) VALUES (#{userId}, #{songId}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT us.id, us.user_id, us.song_id, s.title, s.artist, us.is_saved, us.rating, us.play_count, us.last_played_at FROM user_songs us JOIN songs s ON s.id = us.song_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.is_saved = 1 ORDER BY us.last_played_at DESC
